name: ICHIJIN NO JUTSU (GUST OF WIND TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: H

You create a powerful gust of air (some 50 mph) that has an effect on creatures caught in it, based on their size:

- Tiny or smaller: Knocked prone and sent rolling back for 1d6 x 15 ft, taking 1d4 nonlethal damage per 10 ft.
- Small: Knocked prone and blown back 1d6 x 10 ft.
- Medium: Blown back 1d6 x 5 ft.
- Large or larger: No effect.

The technique cannot blow creatures back further than the edge of its area. Medium and smaller creatures are unable to move against the direction of the wind, and creatures inside the area take a -4 penalty to Listen checks and ranged attack rolls. The gust of wind does anything a powerful wind would be expected to do, such as blow out open fires (or fan larger ones), blowing away gases, etc. and has a 50% chance to blow out protected flames (such as those in lanterns).
